blocks.body: Past Continuous — was / were + verb-ing for actions in progress at a point in the past.

{"level":"A2","intro":"Past Continuous is used for actions that were in progress at a point in the past or formed the background for another event.","rules":[{"label":"Forms","color":"emerald","text":"Start with the model was / were + verb-ing.","example":"I was reading. / They were waiting."},{"label":"Negatives and Questions","color":"blue","text":"Use was / were for negatives and questions.","example":"She wasn't sleeping. / Were they working?"},{"label":"Time expressions","color":"amber","text":"Words like at 7 p.m., at that moment, this time yesterday, while, when often point to this tense.","example":"We were eating at 7 p.m. yesterday."}]}

{"title":"1. Lessons in order","intro":"Start with the form, then move to negatives, questions, and time expressions.","items":[{"label":"A2","title":"Forms and Use","subtitle":"was / were + verb-ing and the main uses."},{"label":"A2","title":"Negatives","subtitle":"was not / were not, wasn't / weren't, and common mistakes."},{"label":"A2","title":"Questions and Short Answers","subtitle":"Was he...? / Were they...? and short answers."},{"label":"A2","title":"Time Expressions","subtitle":"at 8 p.m., this time yesterday, while, when."}]}

{"title":"2. Where you need this tense","sections":[{"label":"Action in progress","color":"emerald","description":"Show that an action was in progress at a particular moment in the past.","examples":[{"en":"I was studying at 8 p.m.","ua":"An action in progress at that time."},{"en":"They were sleeping at midnight.","ua":"The action was still happening."}]},{"label":"Background action","color":"blue","description":"Use the tense for background action when another short event happened in the middle of it.","examples":[{"en":"She was cooking when I called.","ua":"The call interrupted the action."},{"en":"We were walking when it started to rain.","ua":"One action was in progress, then another happened."}]},{"label":"Longer past situation","color":"amber","description":"Show an action or situation that continued for some time in the past.","examples":[{"en":"He was working all evening.","ua":"A longer past activity."},{"en":"I was staying with friends that week.","ua":"A temporary past situation."}]}]}

{"title":"3. In short","items":["Past Continuous = was / were + verb-ing.","Use it for actions in progress at a point in the past.","It often works as the background for another short event.","Words like at that moment, while, and this time yesterday often point to this tense."]}
